dis_application_view.llm_summary: Rafael Santos is a PH national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by DM ALL MOBILE ACCESSORIES LIMITED T/A Phone Kit for IT quality and testing professionals (SOC 2136). The application states salary £41,699 against the SOC going rate £41,200 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS recommends refusal because a mandatory salary rule is not satisfied. Annual salary £41,699 is below the current Skilled Worker general salary floor; mandatory salary rule not satisfied.
